text:
K0710A2_CAL_PRNTRL_PST_CD K0710A2 Percent Caloric Intake Through Parenteral/Tube Feeding While a Resident Code. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the proportion of total calories that the resident received through parenteral or tube feeding while a resident of this faciltity within the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
1=25% or less
2=26-50%
3=51% or more
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective 10/01/2013
396 K0710A3_CAL_PRNTRL_7_DAY_CD K0710A3_CAL_PRNTRL_7_DAY_CD K0710A3 Percent
